CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Dismissal And Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 581(F)(2) For Failure To Timely Amend
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES LLC's Motion For Dismissal And Judgment Pursuant To CCP 581(F)(2) For Failure To Timely Amend is
GRANTED. Complaint is dismissed with prejudice. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege in good faith a viable cause of action against the moving defendant in light of Keshtgar v. U.S. Bank (2014) 226 Cal.App.4th 1201 and Fontenot v. Wells Fargo (2011) 198 Cal.App.4th 256. Plaintiff must allege tender. Prevailing party to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Continued To Oct-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
